MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., specially appearing for plaintiff: Kelkris Associates Inc.
No appearance by judgment debtor

After hearing, the claim of exemption is denied.
Levying officer shall withhold $300.00 per pay period until judgment is satisfied, or further court order. Funds currently held shall be released to judgment creditor. Order signed in open court. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Feb-19-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by court.

Appearances:
JOHN DuBOIS, Esq. (925) 323-4029, specially appearing for plaintiff Kilkris Associates, Inc. dba Credit Bureau Associates
MICHAEL HEATH, Esq. (415) 931-4207 on behalf of defendant Marquis Smith

The parties indicated that the matter has settled. Terms of the settlement were as follows: Parties stipulated to judgment in the sum of $21,799.40. However, defendant Marquis Smith to make periodic payment in the sum of $6,000.00 in $500.00 increments. The first $500.00 to be paid by 12/22/06, and thereafter on the 28th of each month until paid. If defendant defaults on the payment, upon 10 days notice, plaintiff to have judgment for the full amount less any payments already made. CC 1542 waived by parties. All parties agreed to the terms of the settlement.

Judge Pro Tem: Elliott Myles; Clerk: V. Mu; Reporter: Gena Eales, CSR 176 (206)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2006 Set For Trial On Dec-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
